author: Mark Potter
content: Monster come to school ever term and they are incredible! They give the kids an unbelievable day of fun and enjoyment and they are fantastic people! Kind and caring, they spend the day getting to know our kids and having the best time with them! Their equipment is top notch, well serviced and maintained and our pupils love the experience, every, single, time!!!! Want equipment hire for any occasion, please give these guys a call! They are 5 ⭐ s!!!!!!
